message:
fix: address 13 dogfood findings — local entry point, Parquet decode, DX improvements

Major fixes:
- Extract LocalExecutor to src/local-executor.ts (no DO dependencies)
- Create querymode/local entry point that works in Node/Bun without crashing
- Fix Parquet RLE_DICTIONARY V1 def-level section skipping in parquet-decode.ts
- Fix count(*) and bigint aggregation in partial-agg.ts
- Extract Lance v2 parser into shared src/lance-v2.ts module

DX improvements:
- Add .offset(n), .after(cursor) keyset pagination to TableQuery
- Add generic TableQuery<T> and QueryResult<T> for type inference
- Add estimatedRows to ExplainResult, format detection in explain()
- Add local result cache (VipCache) with cacheHit field on QueryResult
- Add QueryModeError class with structured error codes (TABLE_NOT_FOUND, etc.)

New files:
- src/local-executor.ts — LocalExecutor extracted from index.ts
- src/local.ts — Node-safe entry point (no DO module loading)
- src/errors.ts — QueryModeError class
- src/lance-v2.ts — Shared Lance v2 column metadata parser
- dogfood/ecommerce-api.ts — E-commerce analytics dogfood exercise
